series_metadata.series_description: To record an officer''s arrest records and serve as a control of forms issued to an officer, therefore providing management accountability for all arrest records.(HP-54)

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for two years from the last court date listed on the page, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for two years from the last court date listed on the page, then delete., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
